tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Even Zuckerberg has to advertise his AI model on X. X is the real arena.
tweets.translated: RT by @elonmusk：连扎克伯格都得在 X 上宣传他的 AI 模型。X 才是真正的舞台。

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Falcon 9 launches 29 @Starlink satellites from Florida
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：猎鹰 9 号从佛罗里达州发射了 29 颗 @Starlink 卫星

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Kardashev II or we’re not a serious civilization Moon and Mars are necessary steps to this
tweets.translated: RT by @elonmusk：卡尔达肖夫二世，否则我们就不是一个严肃的文明，月球和火星是实现这一目标的必要步骤

tweets.content: 5000 POS terminals of Alatau City Bank in Kazakhstan 🇰🇿 are powered by Binance Pay!
tweets.translated: 哈萨克斯坦阿拉套城市银行🇰🇿的5000台POS终端由Binance Pay提供支持！

tweets.content: Nothing like an internal $META memo getting published. Showing AI ramping as usual: - LTAs signed with Samsung and $SNDK for memory - LTAs signed with Sumitomo Electric for fiber optics - Expected to deploy 7GW compute infra this year, and doubling in 2027. - as much as $145B capex spend this year “It plans to launch a chip about every six months through 2027”
tweets.translated: 没有什么比发布内部 $META 备忘录更好的了。与往常一样，人工智能正在蓬勃发展： - 与三星签署了长期协议，并签署了 $SNDK 内存协议 - 与住友电工签署了光纤长期协议 - 预计今年将部署 7GW 计算基础设施，并在 2027 年翻倍。 - 今年资本支出高达 145B 美元 “计划到 2027 年大约每六个月推出一款芯片”

tweets.content: Wow, looks like Elon + xAI at $SPCX managed to build an Anthropic Opus-level LLM with Grok 4.5. That’s much more cost efficient as well… Kinda emulating what Chinese vendors have been doing to compete on pricing + adoption. (Which is an ideal thing given Chinese model growth among US companies recently) Never doubt Elon, maybe they might end up leapfrogging Anthropic + Mythos?
tweets.translated: 哇，看起来 $SPCX 的 Elon + xAI 成功地使用 Grok 4.5 构建了 Anthropic Opus 级别的 LLM。这也更具成本效益......有点模仿中国供应商在定价和采用方面竞争的做法。 （考虑到最近中国模式在美国公司中的增长，这是一件理想的事情）永远不要怀疑埃隆，也许他们最终可能会超越人类+神话？

tweets.content: $META to build a new $10B DC in Canada to expand AI capacity. So much for the media framing of “Meta Compute”as overbuilding and cutting capex.
tweets.translated: $META 将在加拿大建造一个新的 10B 美元 DC，以扩大人工智能能力。 “元计算”的媒体框架就是过度建设和削减资本支出。
